decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures like Eddymurk Crab and utilizing instant spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State to control the board and deal direct damage. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to ensure consistency in drawing key cards. By efficiently managing resources and maintaining a fast pace, the UR Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and win the game before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on casting cheap and efficient spells to quickly build up a board presence and deal damage to the opponent. It utilizes instants and sorceries that can target creatures or players, along with creatures with abilities that can assist in dealing damage or disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes some control elements to help protect its own creatures and ensure that the opponent's threats are minimized. By combining aggressive creatures with powerful spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a combination of spells and creatures to control the game by disrupting opponents' strategies and maintaining board presence. Cards like Impractical Joke and Traumatic Critique help to disrupt opponents' hands, while Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm provide removal options. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental serve as creatures to maintain board presence, while cards like Spell Snare and Get Out offer protection and utility. With a mix of reactive spells and proactive creatures, this deck aims to outlast opponents and seize control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells while also utilizing powerful cards like Sage of the Skies and Brightglass Gearhulk for additional value. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize. By efficiently managing resources and leveraging the synergy between creatures and support spells, this deck can consistently apply pressure and close out games before the opponent can mount a defense.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on utilizing Aang, Swift Savior and other aggressive creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Avatar's Wrath and Voice of Victory to maintain board control and secure victory. The deck also includes bounce spells like Get Lost and Harbinger of the Tides to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of creature aggression and control elements, this deck aims to apply pressure early and close out the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main focus of this Golgari Control deck is to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan through various means such as removal spells, hand disruption, and efficient creatures. By using cards like Duress, Maelstrom Pulse, and Requiting Hex, along with powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Keen-Eyed Curator, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and grind out a win in the late game. Additionally, the deck utilizes mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and efficient land choices to ensure a smooth mana curve and consistent pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on using cheap spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent's life total. The key strategy involves using cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to draw into threats like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, while also utilizing instant speed spells like Burst Lightning to control the board. By playing aggressively and efficiently, the goal is to outpace the opponent and secure a victory before they can stabilize or establish their own game plan. The deck also includes some bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out for added tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on generating value through creature synergies and tempo plays to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing cards that provide efficient mana ramp like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge, it aims to flood the board with creatures such as Pawpatch Recruit and Sage of the Skies. Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve help provide removal and protection, while Brightglass Gearhulk offers a powerful finisher. The deck's strategy revolves around utilizing the low-cost creatures to apply pressure and secure a fast victory through aggressive plays.

The deck focuses on playing creatures quickly and efficiently to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. It utilizes cards like Ba Sing Se, Earthbender Ascension, and Mightform Harmonizer to quickly build a strong board presence. The deck also includes removal spells like Erode and creatures with abilities like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam to control the board and push for damage. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain momentum throughout the game.

This Golgari Control deck focuses on using a variety of removal spells and disruption cards to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It aims to stabilize the board with cards like Emeritus of Abundance and Witherbloom Charm, while using powerful spells like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex to deal with threats. The deck also has a strong late-game plan with Professor Dellian Fel and The End, while also generating card advantage with Keen-Eyed Curator. Overall, the deck's key concept is to disrupt the opponent's game plan and grind out the win through control and value.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on rapid deployment of creatures and buffs to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing efficient mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck can quickly establish a strong board presence. Cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Mightform Harmonizer provide powerful combat abilities to push through damage. With a mix of utility cards like Escape Tunnel and Erode, the deck maintains versatility while applying pressure. Overall, the strategy revolves around building a strong offensive presence early on and maintaining momentum throughout the game.

The main idea of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension, Mightform Harmonizer, and Llanowar Elves to ramp up mana quickly, the deck aims to play powerful threats like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Using cards like Hushwood Verge and Erode to fix mana and control the board, the deck seeks to apply pressure from the early game onwards. The deck also includes cards like Escape Tunnel and Bushwhack for added mobility and reach to close out games swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice. By utilizing combos like Doomsday Excruciator and Superior Spider-Man, you can overwhelm your opponent with strong creatures early in the game. Control the board with cards like Duress and Bitter Triumph while setting up your reanimation strategy. Overall, this deck focuses on efficiently reanimating creatures to gain a strong advantage and outpace your opponent in a 1 vs 1 matchup.

The UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with efficient creatures and spells that can chip away at the opponent's life total. It utilizes cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Burst Lightning to deal damage while maintaining card advantage with cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also having some protection with cards like Spell Pierce. The key strategy is to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on generating a fast and aggressive gameplay by utilizing low-cost creatures with high power and toughness ratios. It also includes cards that provide mana acceleration, card draw, and removal options to maintain tempo and pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creature plays, while also having access to powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth. The deck's mana base is built to support both the green and blue color requirements of the deck, ensuring consistent access to its powerful cards.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on casting cheap spells and utilizing prowess triggers to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It includes efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, as well as burn spells such as Burst Lightning. The deck also incorporates card draw with Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain tempo. Eddymurk Crab provides additional defense while Stormchaser's Talent boosts the power of the creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creatures, burn spells, and card advantage to win the game.
